name: Github Privileged Accounts on Personal Email Domains
description: Detects privileged github accounts tied to personal email domains.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.email AS email FROM github_organization_members u WHERE 1=1 AND (COALESCE(u.site_admin, false) = true OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%super%') AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.email, '')) SIMILAR TO '%@(gmail|yahoo|hotmail|outlook)\\.com'
remediation: Migrate privileged accounts to corporate identity domains and remove personal-domain privileged access.
